name: Timeline
description: Chronological sequence of events with dates, descriptions, and optional media.

slots.events: Vertical sequence of timeline entries alternating around a central connector line

compact.description: Single-side vertical timeline with all entries on one side of the connector line for compact layouts

slots.events: Compact single-sided vertical timeline entries aligned to one connector line

horizontal.description: Horizontal scrolling timeline with entries arranged left-to-right along a connector line

slots.events: Horizontally scrolling timeline entries arranged along a shared connector line

visual_brief: Vertical sequence of timeline entries connected by a thin vertical line. Each entry has a small circle dot on the line, a date or timestamp label, an event title in medium weight, and a description paragraph. Optional media (images, icons) can appear beside entries. The compact preset reduces spacing and hides descriptions, showing only date and title. The horizontal preset arranges entries left-to-right along a horizontal line with dates below and content above. Milestone entries may have a larger dot or distinct icon.

layout_hints.connector_rhythm: The connector line should unify the sequence visually without overpowering the content. Dots and timestamps need stable alignment across entries.
layout_hints.milestone_emphasis: Milestone entries may be more prominent, but they should still belong to the same temporal rhythm as the surrounding items.
layout_hints.content_balance: Descriptions and optional media should support the chronology rather than turning the timeline into a card gallery.

slots.events: Vertical sequence of timeline entries alternating around a central connector line

responsive.mobile: Vertical timeline only. Line on the left edge with content to the right. Dates above entries. Compact spacing.
responsive.tablet: Standard vertical timeline with comfortable spacing. Content beside the timeline dots.
responsive.desktop: Full vertical or horizontal timeline. Entries alternate left and right of the center line (vertical) or spread evenly (horizontal).

motion.micro: Connector highlights and milestone accents may animate softly on hover and focus.
motion.transitions: New entries or progressive reveals should fade or slide in gently without making the chronology feel unstable.

keyboard: Tab moves through interactive timeline items and associated actions in chronological order.
announcements: Dates, titles, and milestone states should be available semantically rather than through layout alone.
accessibility.focus_management: Keep focus transitions chronological and avoid jumping users between distant timeline entries unexpectedly.
